assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass advocacy board showing employee voices supporting one buyer-relevant LinkedIn moment
assets.notes: Generated PNG blog hero in Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. The source image was generated at 1672x941, then center-cropped and resized to 1600x700 for the blog hero contract. The article metaphor is a central buyer-relevant moment with a small set of employee voice cards choosing different participation modes.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero
Source context from article: This article explains LinkedIn employee advocacy for B2B revenue teams. The central idea is that employee advocacy should be coordinated participation around one buyer-relevant moment, not a generic request for everyone to like and reshare the same company post. The article distinguishes employee advocacy from employee-generated content: advocacy helps a message travel through comments, reshares, DMs, replies, and signal review, while employee-generated content turns employee expertise into original public content. The operating metaphor is a central buyer-relevant LinkedIn moment with a few employee voice cards choosing different participation modes around it.

Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from the article source context. Use one central flat liquid-glass message surface with four small surrounding employee voice cards, each represented by abstract non-readable white lines and simple icons for comment, reshare, private send, and reply. Do not default to an exact LinkedIn post card or real LinkedIn UI.

Style reference: Use the Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style: generated raster PNG, softly blended mesh gradient background using one main color plus at most one close complementary color, matte translucent liquid-glass shapes, simple head-on flat UI, consistent white outline weight, clean negative space, and subtle grain.

Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. Place one central subject with quiet space around it. Keep the graphic readable as a single concept, not an infographic or screenshot.

Scene/backdrop: Soft sky blue and mint mesh gradient, smoothly blended without hard edges. Avoid multi-color mesh palettes.

Subject: A central buyer-relevant moment card surrounded by four smaller employee participation cards, all completely flat and head-on. Keep markings abstract and non-readable: short white lines, simple shapes, and small generic interaction icons only. No readable words.

Detail density: Low. Simple, spacious, and specific. Avoid decorative filler.

Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards full of metrics, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, or three-quarter UI view.
